title: Timeline view mobile - clear users

posts.author: Jason.B (Jason Babic)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have a board with 2 users, an owner and a guest. There are 4 rows, 2 created by the owner, 2 created by the guest.

All 4 rows are visible by both users in the main table and calendar view, in both mobile app and desktop view.

However, when looking at the timeline view, all 4 rows are visible when using desktop, but when using mobile device (android) only the items created by the owner are visible. To see items created by the guest, you need to filter ‘by user’, ‘guest’. When the filter is cleared, again, it only shows items created by the owner.

Is there a way to show all items in timeline view? Same as what is seen on desktop version?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jason.B,

Please kindly ensure that the guest has the appropriate permissions on the board. Additionally, it would be helpful to check that the mobile app is updated to the latest version to avoid any potential issues.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic
